title: Whos A Better Vessel
wikitext:
[]: Who's A Better Vessel?             Quote Post by Tsuki No Nagisa » Thu Jan 19, 2012 10:02 pm Ok..so i was asking me the other day "Who is better holding their paper as angels or life AND first angels? Kaworu or Rei?" i mean..i know they just have part of their soul in them, but...who is better? either as angel, as human, and as a Soul Vessel. I don't know if this is boring..or confusing...but you know, it's Evangelion, the whole name explains "Mind F*ck" :b

[]:             Quote Post by Xana » Thu Jan 19, 2012 10:06 pm A Kaworu vs. Rei thread?? I choose Rei, anytime. but wasn't there a thread like this before? Although, as an Angel, I'll say Kaworu. I probably misunderstood the intended purpose of this thread, but meh.

[]:             Quote Post by Fireball » Thu Jan 19, 2012 10:41 pm wat

[]:             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Thu Jan 19, 2012 10:46 pm Rei over Kaworu any day

[]:             Quote Post by Tsuki No Nagisa » Thu Jan 19, 2012 10:57 pm ..i know, my explanation is not very Accurate... i was saying , who's a better angel, more like...who cares and does more it's Angel and Human paper ....here are a lot of Rei Fans .__. i by my way would sya it like this : "i think Kaworu is better because he cares and knows his paper as an angel, but also bad, because he doesn't know he is Adam :S"

[]:             Quote Post by Xana » Fri Jan 20, 2012 12:04 am Tsuki No Nagisa wrote: here are a lot of Rei Fans

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri Jan 20, 2012 10:42 am Kaworu > Rei in terms of Angelic powers. Kaworu < Rei in terms of character. Adam < Lilith in terms of awesome.

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Fri Jan 20, 2012 12:48 pm I like Kaworu , but in terms of importance to the overall plot I'd say Rei.

[]:             Quote Post by Tankred » Fri Jan 20, 2012 1:45 pm Over the Rainbow . Obviously.

[]:             Quote Post by Fireball » Fri Jan 20, 2012 2:01 pm Rei because of boobs.

[]:             Quote Post by Final Messenger » Fri Jan 20, 2012 3:17 pm Rei I suppose, but if Kaworu had more screen time it might be harder to decided I suppose

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Fri Jan 20, 2012 4:14 pm Picard

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Fri Jan 20, 2012 4:23 pm I don't understand the question. Are they competing? They both seem to do well enough, so I'm not sure the question of who's "better" is relevant (or even meaningful).

[]:             Quote Post by Stallard » Fri Jan 20, 2012 5:24 pm I find it interesting that Kaworu and Rei are of about the same being, yet Kaworu manages to manifest a much higher synchronization ratio.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri Jan 20, 2012 6:00 pm Stallard wrote: I find it interesting that Kaworu and Rei are of about the same being, yet Kaworu manages to manifest a much higher synchronization ratio.

[]:             Quote Post by rhfxz1s » Fri Jan 20, 2012 9:25 pm Sachi wrote: Kaworu is very much aware and open to the implications of his origins; Rei is at odds with herself because of it. I'm not surprised that Rei does as poorly as she does in synchronizing.

[]: Re: Who's A Better Vessel?             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Fri Jan 20, 2012 9:31 pm Tsuki No Nagisa wrote: i mean..i know they just have part of their soul in them

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Fri Jan 20, 2012 10:55 pm Stallard wrote: I find it interesting that Kaworu and Rei are of about the same being, yet Kaworu manages to manifest a much higher synchronization ratio.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Sat Jan 21, 2012 5:45 am Sachi wrote: Kaworu is very much aware and open to the implications of his origins; Rei is at odds with herself because of it. I'm not surprised that Rei does as poorly as she does in synchronizing.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Jan 22, 2012 12:05 am My thoughts are with Sachi's. It's really hard to compare the two when Kaworu's more knowledgeable and comfortable with himself than Rei is with herself. Rei I and Kaworu both needed more screentime for us to really understand them better.
